title: poa radiata
intro: Poa radiata, also known as green grass or annual blue grass, is a type of grass native to Australia and parts of Asia. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Poa radiata include its use in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a salve or ointment, which can be applied topically to treat skin irritations and promote healing.
